label: Cover
notes: Open with your name + role. The cover background is intentionally calm — let it breathe for two seconds before you speak.

label: Agenda
notes: Walk through the three pillars at pace. Don't dwell — this is a signpost, not the content.

label: Stat callout
notes: Pause on the 20%. The 5 highlighted hands out of 25 are the point. Say the number out loud, then move on.

label: Section header
notes: Transitional. Use it to reset the audience's attention before the substantive section that follows.

label: Split intro
notes: First content slide on offwhite. Tone shifts from declarative to explanatory.

label: Stats + navy card
notes: Three proof points. The navy card is decorative — don't read it.

label: Three-up
notes: Three benefits in parallel. Read each title, paraphrase the body one line each.

label: Closing
notes: CTA + screenshot. Land the call to action before transitioning to Q&A.
